textByHash.036c92accda7772df60ffaf8ab15be81bd3535af: To earn the right to wear any skillcape you need to have mastered that skill to the highest level possible and it is no different for Herblore.
textByHash.0eadc76755e52c8467d6c1ec728184dc36936080: He exists in the trees, and the flowers, the water and the rocks. He is everywhere. His purpose is to ensure balance in everything in this world, and as such we worship him.
textByHash.10710197c819882efa4a0915ff12f15a984cb63f: That used to be OUR stone circle. Unfortunately, many many years ago, dark wizards cast a wicked spell upon it so that they could corrupt its power for their own evil ends.
textByHash.1b53e8b96b624bdd1d2c76de6d8c763dc18e812d: Unfortunately we only know of two remaining, and of those only one is usable by us anymore.
textByHash.1b9cb2c50c1ad6fe92d74e4ea0638f5082a1dca1: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood; it's part of a skill promotion deal - buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.1e2240c920e433a48775ecaf4159b3935e10447e: Bear in mind, you must first clean each herb before you can use it.
textByHash.256e7b914c1e4c1781620c7d297f549614c86ffb: What brings you to our holy monument?
textByHash.3a31d7e600bafd64e417f365f7d1e35ac2c3299b: Not at all; there are many other adventurers who would love the opportunity to purchase such a prestigious item. You can find me here if you change your mind.
textByHash.46f24f0bbb4878cb9c3cbbadbb50819cf7392249: Excellent. Go to the village south of this place and speak to my fellow druid, Sanfew, who is working on the purification ritual. He knows what is required to complete it.
textByHash.4c6fe9e855e588de48abc6515651eaacde581c9b: Let's try an example Attack potion: The first ingredient is Guam leaf; the next is Eye of Newt.
textByHash.5768ceea10a1d9be4a63b501a7f033f0d854db7e: You don't appear to have enough space in your inventory, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.58839aff39e9fc3456fdf941957c2e061891a222: We are the druids of Guthix. We worship our god at our famous stone circles. You will find them located throughout these lands.
textByHash.6c293f11dc24ecefd2349e0167e9939cb1b3bcf3: Herblore is the skill of working with herbs and other ingredients, to make useful potions and poison.
textByHash.73ab067eb525332aa7c99030b4a31eed6c4f84d6: With the cape equipped the Nardah Herbalist will create unfinished potions for you and you may search the cape for a pestle and mortar. When you have achieved a level of 99, come back and talk to me again.
textByHash.74fba27bb4c9ece6893614b61cd49b167b4da944: Herbs can be found on the ground, and are also dropped by some monsters when you kill them.
textByHash.7990f54e71a8b74b9166a77fd6bda998e441857a: Hmm. I think I may have a worthwhile quest for you actually. I don't know if you are familiar with the stone circle south of Varrock or not, but...
textByHash.81649ec6e028ba5606463e2ff9e39759a8b29564: I will not try and change your mind adventurer. Some day when you have matured you may reconsider your position. We will wait until then.
textByHash.8dbe2adc73709753e70187b6618aa2783cf97386: Then you must gather the herbs needed to make the potion you want.
textByHash.8f69c8d08f0e5abeda2cd48ac64485852003c322: Hello again. How is the Herblore going?
textByHash.9cc08d8024107cd3ea19ba8af329eda120467537: You may also have to grind some ingredients before you can use them. You will need a pestle and mortar in order to do this.
textByHash.9f5d9c03f3c7f7860f328bbaf323f619a1923816: It has been a pleasure to watch you grow as a herbalist. I am privileged to have been instrumental in your learning, but I must ask for a donation of 99,000 coins to cover the expense of the cape.
textByHash.a46042f3ffd26b99af78a5679b74b2ce531fc57a: Some day when your mind achieves enlightenment you will see the true beauty of his power.
textByHash.ab50493390a05ab1043f728cc2719596749f64ef: You must fill your vial with water and add the ingredients you need. There are normally 2 ingredients to each type of potion.
textByHash.ac58b694a7e307448ef178e043d2659b962e4b55: Good luck with your Herblore practices, and a good day to you.
textByHash.cc84e38c2cc23a99a95ef16c8ab863542b8401c5: Different potions also require different Herblore levels before you can make them.
textByHash.d64650fb338e53b05b3e803b1a7f9c53f27883b3: Most certainly, but I must ask for a donation of 99,000 coins to cover the expense of the cape.
textByHash.daa48c879474a12bca7be22226fc3f55ff4fac2e: Guthix is the oldest and most powerful god in Gielinor. His existence is vital to this world. He is the god of balance, and nature; he is also a very part of this world.
textByHash.dc376a2c703d8d2473b6be805c46f8b223f34cc9: Hello again, adventurer. You will need to speak to my fellow druid Sanfew in the village south of here to continue in your quest.
textByHash.e11f212272e2ef58f2b3c1d1d22621f82c048b95: First you will need a vial, which can be found or made with the crafting skill.
textByHash.f0009e448f18bf6cb5c1785da7a086e9aa7511a7: I have word from Sanfew that you have been very helpful in assisting him with his preparations for the purification ritual. As promised I will now teach you the ancient arts of Herblore.
textByHash.f084859f80e22f557df7268bfb18ee28aee146a2: Most certainly; the Nardah Herbalist will recognize this cape and create unfinished potions for you and it may be searched for a pestle and mortar.
textByHash.f12141233fc3e952f5c93e956ef333dd4ddad57a: What, personally? No, of course I didn't. However, our forefathers did. The first Druids of Guthix built many stone circles across these lands over eight hundred years ago.
textByHash.f44e2bbaf2058fa27b0c413629e1ea4e5916df3a: Goodbye adventurer. I feel we shall meet again.
textByHash.fa3f550795afa8568016548d3b93f769a2b3d0bb: Mix these in your water-filled vial, and you will produce an Attack potion. Drink this potion to increase your Attack level.
textByHash.fc3aee32aa6cb03eb3af28334e65a5c4075069b4: When they cursed the rocks for their rituals they made them useless to us and our magics. We require a brave adventurer to go on a quest for us to help purify the circle of Varrock.
textByHash.feb1b32de4c421fc949a6038c64e2a0dcdbdd4a3: Most certainly, and free of charge!
